title: Four Candies 39 PCS School Stationery Supplies with Cute Pencil Case, 12 Pastel Highlighters, 5 Black Ink Gel Pens, 6 Mechanical Pencils,  Aesthetic Girly Stationary Set (Pink)
features: All-in-One Stationery Set: Back to school essential for college students, teachers, and office professionals; This bulk pack includes 6 gel pens, 6 art mechanical pencils, 12 pastel highlighters, a black pencil pouch, 5 pen refills, 3 erasers, 18 cap erasers, 8 lead refill tubes and 2 sharpeners
Large Capacity Black Pencil Pouch: This big, expandable organizer features four spacious compartments for neat school & office supply storage; Made from soft, waterproof material with a smooth zipper

6 PCS Fine Point Gel Pens: Ideal for journaling and note taking, these 0.5 mm smooth writing gel ink pens feature a comfortable grip and quick drying ink to prevent smudges; The weighted design ensures balanced control, while the protective clip keeps your papers safe; Includes 5 refills for long-lasting use

12 Assorted Colors Highlighters: Ideal for book annotation and Bible study, these no bleed markers feature eye-friendly pastel colors and a dual-tip chisel design for both precision and broad highlighting; The quick-drying ink prevents smudging while keeping pages clean and crisp for textbooks and planners

Professional Mechanical Pencil Set for Drawing & Drafting: Ideal for art, sketch, and architecture work, this set includes 6 metal pencils (0.5mm for fine details, 0.7mm versatile, 0.9mm smooth shading, and 3×2.0mm lead holders for bold strokes); Comes with 228 lead refills (2H/HB/2B/4B), bonus 36 colored leads and eraser set; The ergonomic grip ensures slip-free control for precise drafting and creative work
description: Product Description WELCOME BACK TO SCHOOL! Previous page 12-Color Highlighters Eye-Friendly Colors / Chisel Tip: Create thick and thin line / No Smudges / Bleed-resistant 6PCS Gel Pens Smooth Writing / Soft-Touch Coating / Balanced Weight / Paper-safe Pen Clip / 5 Extra Refills 6PCS Mechanical Pencils 4 Size(0.5mm+0.7mm+0.9mm+2.0mm) / 264 Lead Refills(2H+HB+2B+4B+CR) / 21 Eraser Set / 2 Sharpeners Next page 1 Highlight Key Points 2 Write Anywhere 3 Study & Arts Are the pastel highlighters in this pack suitable for fine and bold lines? Yes, they have a chisel tip for easy switching between fine and bold lines. Is the pencil pouch durable and easy to carry? It's soft, waterproof, durable, with a smooth zipper for ease of use. Do the gel pens dry quickly for smudge-free writing? Yes, they have quick-drying ink to prevent smearing or staining. Are the mechanical pencils comfortable for long writing sessions? They have a anti-slip grip for a comfortable hold, ideal for writing and drawing. Can the supplies last a long time without needing immediate replacements? Absolutely, it comes with pen refills, lead refills, and eraser refills for longevity.

specifications_table.Special Features: Long Lasting, Pocket Clip, Quick Drying, Refillable, Smudge Free
